sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: United Airlines Holdings Inc. stock outperforms competitors despite losses on the day
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings Inc. (UAL) shares fell 1.98% to $88.62 on Wednesday, marking its third consecutive day of losses. This occurred during an overall poor trading session where the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average also declined. Despite the drop, the article states UAL's stock "outperforms competitors" but does not provide specific comparative data.

feed.title: Everest Group: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Everest Group (EG) reported a first-quarter profit of $653 million, or $16.21 per share. Adjusted earnings of $16.08 per share surpassed analyst estimates of $14.03 per share. However, the reinsurance company's revenue of $4.07 billion fell short of the $4.41 billion expected by analysts.

feed.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says the “most noble” career is this
feed.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang, recently honored with the IEEE Medal of Honor, stated that engineering is the "most noble" career. He believes engineers are the foundation of society, transforming ideas into reality by solving complex problems. Despite AI reshaping various professions, Huang maintains that engineering remains one of the most vital career paths.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (ORLY) O'Reilly Automotive Posts Q1 EPS $0.72, vs. FactSet Est of $0.70
feed.summary: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) announced Q1 EPS of $0.72, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $0.70. The company also reported Q1 revenue of $4.56 billion, exceeding the FactSet estimate of $4.46 billion. This financial performance indicates stronger-than-expected results for the automotive parts distributor.

feed.title: Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) Vice Chairman Sells $483,666.48 in Stock
feed.summary: Travelers Companies Vice Chairman William Heyman sold 1,557 shares of the company's stock for $483,666.48, reducing his stake by 0.60%. This insider sale follows the company's strong Q1 earnings, where it beat analyst expectations, and the board's approval of a $5.0 billion share buyback program and an increased quarterly dividend. Analysts currently have a consensus "Hold" rating on TRV stock with a price target of $309.13.

feed.title: NVIDIA Sets Conference Call for First-Quarter Financial Results
feed.summary: NVIDIA announced it will host a conference call on Wednesday, May 20, at 2 p.m. PT (5 p.m. ET) to discuss its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2027. The call will be webcast live on investor.nvidia.com, with a Q&A session for financial analysts and institutional investors following prepared remarks. Colette Kress, CFO, will also provide written commentary on the results, posted ahead of the call.

feed.title: Ecolab to Webcast Annual Meeting on May 7, 2026
feed.summary: Ecolab (NYSE: ECL) will host a virtual-only annual meeting of stockholders via live webcast on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 9:30 a.m. Central Time. Stockholders can participate and ask questions by entering a 16-digit control number, while other interested parties can register as guests in listen-only mode. A replay of the webcast will be available 24 hours after the meeting concludes.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (INVH) Invitation Homes Posts Q1 AFFO $0.41, vs. FactSet Est of $0.41
feed.summary: Invitation Homes Inc. (INVH) announced Q1 Adjusted Funds From Operations (AFFO) of $0.41 per share, meeting FactSet's estimated $0.41. The company also expects its full-year 2026 AFFO to be in the range of $1.60 - $1.68, aligning with FactSet's estimate of $1.64. Additionally, Invitation Homes reported Q1 revenue of $734.1 million, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $689.9 million.

feed.title: Smart Share Global Limited Announces Completion of Going Private Transaction
feed.summary: Smart Share Global Limited (Energy Monster) has completed its going-private merger with Mobile Charging Merger Limited, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary of MidCo. As a result, the company will cease to be publicly traded, with its ADSs to be delisted from Nasdaq and its SEC reporting obligations suspended. Shareholders will receive cash consideration of US$1.25 per ADS or US$0.625 per Class A ordinary share.

feed.title: Energy Monster leaves Nasdaq after $1.25-per-ADS buyout closes
feed.summary: Smart Share Global (Nasdaq: EM), also known as Energy Monster, has completed its going-private merger and ceased to be publicly traded. Each ADS was canceled for $1.25 cash, and the company plans to delist from Nasdaq and suspend its SEC reporting obligations. This marks the culmination of a multi-stage process that began in late 2025.

feed.title: Biogen beats estimates as Alzheimer’s drug gains momentum
feed.summary: Biogen reported first-quarter sales and profit that exceeded expectations, driven by the increasing momentum of its Alzheimer's drug, Leqembi, and cost-cutting measures. Despite facing competition for its multiple sclerosis drugs, Leqembi's sales are accelerating, and the company is anticipating FDA approval for a new at-home injectable version. Biogen updated its profit forecast downward due to recent deals but maintained its overall sales outlook.

feed.title: MGM Shares Dip After Q1 Earnings — Here's Why
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International's shares dipped after reporting mixed Q1 earnings, with diluted earnings per share missing analyst estimates but revenue exceeding expectations. The company highlighted record first-quarter consolidated net revenues driven by MGM China, MGM Digital, and BetMGM North America Venture. Las Vegas Strip Resorts also showed year-over-year revenue growth for the first time since Q3 2024.

feed.title: Citizens Bank Data Breach Lawsuit Investigation
feed.summary: Shamis & Gentile P.A. is investigating a data breach at Citizens Bank, NA, which exposed sensitive personal information of some customers. The breach, disclosed on April 28, 2026, involved a vendor's systems and affected 428 individuals in Massachusetts, compromising names, addresses, and financial account numbers. Individuals affected may be entitled to compensation and are encouraged to complete a form to determine eligibility for a lawsuit.

feed.title: First Interstate BancSystem Announces Q1 2026 Results, Capital Actions
feed.summary: First Interstate BancSystem reported mixed Q1 2026 results, with net income rising year-over-year but decreasing from the previous quarter. The bank demonstrated confidence through significant share repurchases and a steady dividend, despite rising non-performing assets and elevated criticized loans. An analyst has a Buy rating on FIBK stock with a $38.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it Neutral.

feed.title: PulteGroup Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.26 Per Share
feed.summary: PulteGroup, Inc. announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.26 per common share. This dividend is payable on July 2, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 16, 2026. The company, a major homebuilder in the U.S., also recently reported its first-quarter financial results and a $1.5 billion increase to its share repurchase authorization.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (FIBK) First Interstate BancSystem, Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $241.8M, vs. FactSet Est of $242.8M
feed.summary: First Interstate BancSystem, Inc. (FIBK) announced its Q1 revenue reached $241.8 million, falling slightly short of FactSet's estimated $242.8 million. This earnings report comes after recent analyst downgrades, including UBS moving the stock to 'Sell' with a reduced price target of $30. The company's stock performance shows a 3.50% decrease today, with its market closed at 04:00:00 PM EDT.

feed.title: eBay revenue climbs 19% as collectibles and recommerce drive growth
feed.summary: eBay reported a 19% increase in revenue, reaching $3.1 billion for the quarter ending March 31, driven by strong growth in gross merchandise volume (GMV). GMV rose 18% to $22.2 billion, attributed to expanding live shopping features and the Depop acquisition. The e-commerce giant continues to see growth through collectibles and recommerce initiatives.

feed.title: Everest Group (NYSE:EG) Misses Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
feed.summary: Everest Group (NYSE:EG) missed Wall Street's revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales declining 4.6% year-on-year to $4.07 billion, and net premiums earned also falling short of estimates. Despite this, the company's non-GAAP profit of $16.08 per share significantly beat analysts' consensus estimates. Everest Group's book value per share continued to grow strongly, with a 9.7% annual clip over the last five years and a projected 15.6% growth over the next 12 months.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (FCPT) Four Corners Property Trust, Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $78.2M
feed.summary: Four Corners Property Trust, Inc. (FCPT) announced its Q1 revenue reached $78.2 million. The company, a real estate investment trust specializing in restaurant and retail properties, also reported Q1 AFFO of $0.45 per share, meeting FactSet estimates. FCPT actively expanded its portfolio with recent acquisitions including Fogo de Chao and National Veterinary Associates properties.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Lowers Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) Price Target to $365.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has reduced its price target for Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) to $365.00 from $385.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment comes despite Sherwin-Williams beating Q1 earnings and revenue estimates and reaffirming its FY2026 EPS guidance, supported by pricing power and an acquisition. Several other analysts have also trimmed their price targets, contributing to the stock trading down amidst elevated volume and insider selling.

feed.title: Evotec seeks seventh board seat after MAK Capital agreement
feed.summary: Evotec has nominated Dr. Wolfgang Hofmann as an independent member for its Supervisory Board and proposed expanding the board from six to seven members. This move follows a cooperation agreement with key shareholder MAK Capital, which includes customary voting and cooperation commitments. The nominations and board expansion will be voted on at the Annual General Meeting scheduled for June 11, 2026.

feed.title: Chipotle rallies after posting a surprise positive comp for Q1 (CMG:NYSE)
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) rallied in after-hours trading after reporting a surprise positive comparable sales growth for Q1. The company saw a 6.9% increase in total revenue to $3.1 billion, driven by new restaurant openings and a 0.5% increase in comparable restaurant sales due to higher transactions. Despite margin decreases from higher operational costs, Chipotle projects opening 350 to 370 new restaurants and anticipates flat comparable sales for the full year.

feed.title: O’Reilly Automotive, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: O’Reilly Automotive, Inc. announced strong first quarter 2026 results, with comparable store sales increasing by 8.1% and diluted earnings per share growing by 16% to $0.72. The company reported a 10% increase in sales to $4.56 billion and an 11% rise in gross profit. O'Reilly also updated its full-year 2026 guidance, forecasting total revenue between $18.7 billion and $19.0 billion and diluted earnings per share from $3.15 to $3.25.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (INVH) Invitation Homes Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $734.1M, vs. FactSet Est of $689.9M
feed.summary: Invitation Homes Inc. (INVH) announced its Q1 revenue reached $734.1 million, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $689.9 million. The report also indicated that the company expects its full-year 2026 Adjusted FFO to range from $1.60 to $1.68, aligning with analyst expectations. This financial update follows several recent analyst price target adjustments and a declared quarterly cash dividend of $0.30 per share.

feed.title: Verisign (VRSN) EVP Danny McPherson sells 5,000 common shares in open market
feed.summary: Verisign's EVP of Technology & CSO, Danny R. McPherson, sold 5,000 shares of company common stock on April 28, 2026, for a weighted average price of $271.0213 per share, totaling approximately $1.36 million. Following this open-market transaction, McPherson directly holds 35,195.1627 shares of Verisign common stock. This insider sale is recorded in a Form 4 filing, indicating a negative sentiment on the transaction's impact.

feed.title: MGM Resorts International revenue reaches $4.5 billion in the first quarter, up 4%
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International reported first-quarter 2026 revenue of $4.5 billion, a 4% increase year-over-year, driven by strong performance in MGM China and MGM Digital. Despite a decrease in net income and Adjusted EBITDA compared to the previous year, the company saw growth in Las Vegas Strip Resorts for the first time in over a year. MGM's CFO highlighted the strategic sale of MGM Northfield Park, providing liquidity for share repurchases and balance sheet strength.

feed.title: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE:KVUE) Declares $0.21 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE:KVUE) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2075 per share, payable on May 27th to shareholders of record by May 13th. The company's dividend payout ratio is 68.0%, forecast to be 71.6% next year, indicating it is sufficiently covered by earnings. Kenvue recently reported strong Q1 earnings, beating analyst estimates with $0.27 EPS and $3.78 billion in revenue.

feed.title: General Motors Lifts 2026 Outlook on US$500 Million Tariff Relief
feed.summary: General Motors has increased its full-year 2026 profit forecast due to an estimated US$500 million reduction in tariff costs following a US Supreme Court ruling. This decision helped bolster first-quarter earnings, with adjusted EPS reaching US$3.70, surpassing analyst expectations, and led to a revised adjusted EBIT outlook of US$13.5 billion to US$15.5 billion for 2026. The automaker's improved financial outlook also includes a maintained free cash flow forecast and a recently announced quarterly dividend, demonstrating stable operational performance amidst ongoing industry-wide tariff challenges.

feed.title: Verisk Analytics, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRSK) Announces $0.50 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share, payable on June 30th to shareholders of record as of June 15th. The company has consistently raised its dividend for six consecutive years, and analysts project strong earnings coverage for the upcoming dividends. Verisk Analytics recently reported solid quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue.

feed.title: Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) Plans $0.02 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) announced a $0.02 quarterly dividend to be paid on July 1st to shareholders of record by June 12th. The aerospace company's dividend payout is well-covered by earnings, with analysts expecting $7.35 EPS next year. Textron's stock recently traded up 1.8%, and the company also saw significant insider selling by its Chairman and EVP in February.

feed.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) Plans $0.94 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.94 per share, payable on June 4th to shareholders of record on May 20th. The biopharmaceutical company reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, beating analyst estimates for both EPS and revenue, driven by demand for Dupixent and Eylea HD, and announced a $3 billion share buyback program. Despite positive financial results, the stock traded down 6.2% following mixed market sentiment, including concerns over declining total U.S. Eylea sales and increasing market competition.

feed.title: Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) Given New $31.00 Price Target at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) to $31.00, indicating a potential upside of 5.25%. This adjustment follows Franklin Resources' strong Q2 earnings, which surpassed analyst estimates with EPS of $0.71 and revenue of $1.75 billion. The company also reported significant long-term net inflows, alternatives growth, and share repurchases, contributing to an average "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $28.56.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] AMERIPRISE FINANCIAL INC Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported a passive beneficial ownership of 6,841,348 shares of Ameriprise Financial Inc. common stock, constituting 7.54% of the class as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates a passive investment intent, with Vanguard exercising sole voting power over 909,297 shares and sole dispositive power over all 6,841,348 shares. The filing specifies that these holdings include securities managed for Vanguard funds and client accounts.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Custom Truck One Source (NYSE:CTOS) Stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for Custom Truck One Source (NYSE:CTOS) from $6.00 to $8.00, though it maintains an "underweight" rating on the stock, indicating a potential downside of 12.61%. Despite this, other analysts like Cantor Fitzgerald and Stifel Nicolaus have set higher price targets of $11.00 with "overweight" or "buy" ratings, contributing to a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $8.83 for CTOS. The company recently reported better-than-expected Q1 earnings, with revenue up 9.3% year-over-year and a raised adjusted EBITDA target for 2026.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Cuts Century Communities (NYSE:CCS) Price Target to $45.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Century Communities (NYSE:CCS) from $49.00 to $45.00, maintaining an "underweight" rating, suggesting a potential downside of 18.95%. This follows other analysts who have also adjusted their ratings and price targets for the construction company. Century Communities recently reported Q1 earnings of $0.88 EPS, beating analyst estimates, but its revenue of $789.67 million fell short of expectations, and the stock traded down 6.0% on Wednesday.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Lowers Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) Price Target to $170.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) from $180.00 to $170.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment follows Allegion's recent quarterly earnings, where the company reported $1.80 EPS, missing the consensus estimate of $1.88, and revenue of $1.03 billion, also below expectations. Despite the target cut, Allegion announced a $500 million share repurchase program, signaling management belief in undervaluation.

feed.title: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.31
feed.summary: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.3075 per share, payable on June 1st to shareholders of record as of May 15th. The company has a history of consistently raising its dividend for the past 29 years, with a comfortable payout ratio of 33.0% and an expected future payout ratio of 30.8% based on analyst forecasts. CHD recently reported strong Q4 earnings, beating consensus estimates with $0.86 EPS on revenue of $1.64 billion.

feed.title: MGM Resorts Reports Lower First-Quarter Profit, Higher Revenue on China Growth
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International reported a decrease in profit for the first quarter, logging $125.1 million compared to $148.6 million a year earlier. Despite this, the company saw an increase in revenue, reaching $4.45 billion, driven significantly by growth in its China operations.

feed.title: Travelers Companies Insider Sold Shares Worth $483,670, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at Travelers Companies (TRV) has sold shares valued at $483,670, as per a recent SEC filing. This transaction was published on April 29, 2026, at 04:42 pm EDT. The article also mentions recent analyst ratings and other insider transactions for Travelers.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 10.65M-share stake in Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 10,649,201 shares of Akamai Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM) Common Stock, representing 7.34% of the class as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates Vanguard possesses sole voting power over 1,261,420 shares and sole dispositive power over all 10,649,201 shares. This disclosure, signed on April 29, 2026, reflects securities managed across various Vanguard affiliates and funds.

feed.title: KLA Corporation’s (NASDAQ:KLAC) Q1 Sales Top Estimates But Stock Drops
feed.summary: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) exceeded Wall Street's Q1 revenue and EPS estimates, with sales up 11.5% year-on-year to $3.42 billion and adjusted EPS at $9.40. Despite the strong financial performance and better-than-expected revenue guidance for Q2, the stock dropped 7.7%. The article highlights the company's robust business momentum, consistent revenue growth, and notes that its inventory levels are slightly above the long-term average.

feed.title: Why Ebay Shares Are Seesawing Wednesday
feed.summary: eBay reported first-quarter financial results that beat Street estimates for revenue and earnings per share, with GMV up 18% year-over-year. However, shares are seesawing lower after the company's second-quarter guidance came in lower than or in line with estimates. The company's focus categories and recommerce priorities are driving momentum, notably highlighted by a record-breaking sale at its owned auction company, Goldin.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 7.51% stake in Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN) via Schedule 13G
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 7.51% beneficial ownership stake in Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN), comprising 40,510,484 shares of common stock as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made via a Schedule 13G filing, indicating a passive investment rather than an intent to control the company. Vanguard holds sole voting power over 5,496,252 shares and sole dispositive power over all 40,510,484 shares.

feed.title: EQT Corp director Vicky Bailey sells $246,136 in company stock
feed.summary: EQT Corp director Vicky Bailey sold 4,116 shares of company stock for $246,136, leaving her with zero direct ownership. The sale occurred after the stock delivered an 11% year-to-date return and a 17% gain over the past year. InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued with a "GREAT" financial health score, and EQT recently surpassed Q1 2026 earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Travelers vice chairman William Heyman sells $483,670 in shares
feed.summary: William H. Heyman, Vice Chairman of Travelers Companies, Inc., sold 1,557 shares of the company's common stock for $483,670 after exercising stock options. The sale occurred when Travelers' stock was near its 52-week high, and the company has a "GREAT" Financial Health Score according to InvestingPro. This follows Travelers' strong Q1 2025 earnings, which led several analysts to raise their price targets for the stock.

feed.title: CoStar Group, Homes.com surge in Q1 — CEO welcomes end of activist ‘distraction’
feed.summary: CoStar Group reported its 60th consecutive quarter of double-digit revenue growth in Q1 2026, with total revenue reaching $897 million, a 23% increase year-over-year. Homes.com significantly contributed to this growth, with revenue up 58% and agent subscribers surging 205%. CEO Andrew Florance confirmed the sale of shares by activist investor Third Point, viewing it as the end of a "distraction" and reaffirming confidence in the company's strategy through 2030.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (NYSE: ALL) reports 19.5M shares, 7.52% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported a beneficial ownership of 19,534,169 shares of Allstate Corp common stock, which represents a 7.52% stake in the company. The Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole voting power over 2,654,305 shares and sole dispositive power over all 19,534,169 shares. This passive investment disclosure was signed on April 29, 2026.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands (NYSE: LVS) grants CEO 167,081 RSUs
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands (NYSE: LVS) has granted its Chairman & CEO, Patrick Dumont, 167,081 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) as compensation. These RSUs represent a contingent right to receive one share of common stock each and will vest in three tranches: 33% on March 2, 2027, 33% on March 2, 2028, and 34% on March 2, 2029. Dumont will directly hold 167,081 RSUs from this grant following the transaction.

feed.title: KLA declines after releasing Q3 results featuring 11.8% revenue increase
feed.summary: KLA (KLAC) stock declined following its Q3 earnings release, despite reporting an 11.8% increase in revenue. Although the company met analyst expectations for earnings per share and beat revenue forecasts, the market reacted negatively to the announcement.

feed.title: O’Reilly (ORLY) Q1 2026 EPS climbs 16% as comps rise 8.1%
feed.summary: O'Reilly Automotive reported strong first-quarter 2026 results with sales increasing 10% to $4.56 billion and diluted earnings per share climbing 16% to $0.72, driven by an 8.1% rise in comparable store sales. The company generated $785.1 million in free cash flow and repurchased $923 million in shares. O'Reilly also updated its full-year 2026 guidance, projecting total revenue of $18.7–$19.0 billion and diluted EPS of $3.15–$3.25.
